name: Tuna Pasta Alfredo with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water for pasta to a boil.
2. In a separate pot, bring milk, broth, garlic, bay leaf, thyme, and pepper to a boil. Remove from heat. Cover and let stand for 15 minutes. Remove the bay leaf.
3. Melt margarine in a saucepan. Stir in flour; cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is bubbly (about 1 minute).
4. Add milk mixture, whisking constantly. Return to heat and remove from heat. Cover and let stand for 2 minutes.
5. Reduce pan temperature to medium-low. Simmer, stirring often, until sauce has thickened and is smooth (about 8-10 minutes). (I added a bit of Wondra flour to thicken it more, but be careful not to get it too thick.)
6. While the sauce is simmering, cook pasta in boiling water; drain.
7. Microwave vegetables until just tender. Chop into small pieces.
8. Add tuna and vegetables to the sauce and mix.
9. Carefully fold in cooked pasta.
